channels.title: Cognito
channels.description:
Hi - we make video lessons for science and maths, aiming to give a concise run through of everything you'll need to know for your exams.

Each video has been designed specifically for the 9-1 GCSE courses, and although they most closely mirror the AQA spec, everything you need to know for the main exam boards will be covered.

We also have a website where you can work through the lesson videos and answer a series of practice questions to check you know all the required learning points. All your

channels.title: Serrano.Academy
channels.description:
Welcome to Serrano.Academy! I'm Luis Serrano and I love demystifying concepts, capturing their essence, and sharing these videos with you. I prefer illustrations, analogies, and cartoons, rather than formulas (although we don't shy away from the math when needed).

The topics I have are machine learning, mathematics (probability and statistics), but I'm open to many others. If you have any topics you'd like to suggest, feel free to add them in the comments or drop me a line!

For more informatio

channels.title: Miss Estruch
channels.description:
Hello, I'm Miss Estruch,

A biology teacher and tutor of over 15 years. I'm here to help you get to grips with studying biology, improve your exam technique & help you get the grades you deserve.

Maybe you’re enjoying the learning & cracking through the practical assessments, but freeze up in fear at the thought of exams. Maybe there are certain topics that just refuse to make sense.  Maybe you understand the content, but you keep attaining lower marks than you expected because of the exam tech

channels.title: Weights & Biases
channels.description:
Weights & Biases helps AI developers build better models faster. Quickly track experiments, version and iterate on datasets, evaluate model performance, reproduce models, and manage your ML workflows end-to-end.

Please subscribe to our channel and turn on notifications for future videos!

channels.title: Cognitive Revolution "How AI Changes Everything"
channels.description:
The Cognitive Revolution is a podcast about AI where hosts Nathan Labenz and Erik Torenberg interview the builders on the edge of AI and explore the dramatic shift it will unlock over the next decades. 

If you love The Cognitive Revolution, head over to Moment of Zen (https://www.youtube.com/@MomentofZenPodcast) for weekly episodes from Erik Torenberg, Dan Romero, Antonio Garcia Martinez, and a revolving slate of guests talking tech, business, and AI.

channels.title: RAIL
channels.description:
The official channel of the Robotic AI & Learning Lab at UC Berkeley

We are faculty, students, and post-docs who conduct research on machine learning, robotics, and everything in-between.

Website: https://rail.eecs.berkeley.edu/
Lab director: Sergey Levine [https://people.eecs.berkeley.edu/~svlevine/]

channels.title: CodersVoice (CodersVoice)
channels.description: Learn, Teach,  Inspire. I make videos in STEM education and hope they could help some viewers.

channels.title: Andrei Dumitrescu
channels.description:
Welcome! I'm Andrei Dumitrescu — your guide to mastering real-world tech skills through hands-on tutorials.

On this channel, we dive into the latest in AI, Machine Learning, Python Programming, Linux, and Cybersecurity through practical projects, step-by-step guidance, and zero fluff. Whether you're a beginner, an aspiring ethical hacker, or a future DevOps engineer, you'll learn how to build real-world solutions and stay ahead in a rapidly evolving tech landscape.
